creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
I (maintainer) agree with the submitter of this PR that .js scripts should be installed in
{PREFIX}/share/pear/data/HTML_AJAX directory. Unfortunatelly, submitter hasn't sent a patch that
will make this happen.
